# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

<?php // resources/views/comments/index.blade.php ?>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Blog Comments</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
            background-color: #f4f6f9;
            color: #333;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }

        .container {
            max-width: 800px;
            margin: 40px auto;
            padding: 0 20px;
        }

        .blog-title {
            font-size: 2rem;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: #1a1a2e;
        }

        .blog-meta {
            color: #666;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            padding-bottom: 20px;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
        }

        .comments-section {
            margin-top: 30px;
        }

        .comments-header {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            color: #1a1a2e;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }

        .comments-count {
            background-color: #4361ee;
            color: white;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            padding: 2px 10px;
            border-radius: 12px;
        }

        .comment-card {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease;
        }

        .comment-card:hover {
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
        }

        .comment-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }

        .comment-avatar {
            width: 45px;
            height: 45px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background-color: #4361ee;
            color: white;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-weight: bold;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            margin-right: 12px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .comment-author-info {
            flex-grow: 1;
        }

        .comment-author {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #1a1a2e;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .comment-date {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #888;
        }

        .comment-content {
            padding: 10px 0 10px 57px;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            color: #444;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .comment-content a {
            color: #4361ee;
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        .comment-content a:hover {
            text-decoration: underline;
        }

        .comment-content strong,
        .comment-content b {
            color: #1a1a2e;
        }

        .comment-content em,
        .comment-content i {
            color: #555;
        }

        .comment-actions {
            padding-left: 57px;
            margin-top: 8px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
        }

        .comment-action-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            color: #888;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }

        .comment-action-btn:hover {
            color: #4361ee;
        }

        .comment-form {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 25px;
            margin-top: 30px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
        }

        .comment-form h3 {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            color: #1a1a2e;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 15px;
        }

        .form-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 5px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #555;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .form-group textarea {
            width: 100%;
            min-height: 120px;
            padding: 12px;
            border: 2px solid #e0e0e0;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            resize: vertical;
            transition: border-color 0.2s;
        }

        .form-group textarea:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #4361ee;
        }

        .formatting-hint {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #888;
            margin-top: 5px;
        }

        .formatting-hint code {
            background: #f0f0f0;
            padding: 1px 5px;
            border-radius: 3px;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
        }

        .submit-btn {
            background-color: #4361ee;
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 10px 25px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 1rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
            transition: background-color 0.2s;
        }

        .submit-btn:hover {
            background-color: #3651d4;
        }

        .no-comments {
            text-align: center;
            padding: 40px;
            color: #888;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .alert-success {
            background-color: #d4edda;
            color: #155724;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
        }

        .alert-error {
            background-color: #f8d7da;
            color: #721c24;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
        }

        .reply-indicator {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: #4361ee;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            padding-left: 57px;
        }

        .nested-comment {
            margin-left: 40px;
            border-left: 3px solid #e0e0e0;
            padding-left: 15px;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="container">
        {{-- Blog Post Title --}}
        <h1 class="blog-title">{{ $post->title }}</h1>
        <div class="blog-meta">
            By <strong>{{ $post->author->name }}</strong> &middot; {{ $post->created_at->format('F j, Y') }} &middot; {{ $post->reading_time }} min read
        </div>

        {{-- Flash Messages --}}
        @if(session('success'))
            <div class="alert-success">
                {{ session('success') }}
            </div>
        @endif

        @if(session('error'))
            <div class="alert-error">
                {{ session('error') }}
            </div>
        @endif

        {{-- Comments Section --}}
        <div class="comments-section">
            <div class="comments-header">
                Comments
                <span class="comments-count">{{ $comments->count() }}</span>
            </div>

            @forelse($comments as $comment)
                <div class="comment-card" id="comment-{{ $comment->id }}">
                    <div class="comment-header">
                        <div class="comment-avatar">
                            {{ strtoupper(substr($comment->user->name, 0, 1)) }}
                        </div>
                        <div class="comment-author-info">
                            <div class="comment-author">{{ $comment->user->name }}</div>
                            <div class="comment-date">
                                {{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                                @if($comment->created_at != $comment->updated_at)
                                    <span>(edited)</span>
                                @endif
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    @if($comment->parent_id)
                        <div class="reply-indicator">
                            &#8627; Replying to {{ $comment->parent->user->name }}
                        </div>
                    @endif

                    {{-- Render comment content with HTML formatting preserved --}}
                    <div class="comment-content">
                        {!! $comment->content !!}
                    </div>

                    <div class="comment-actions">
                        <button class="comment-action-btn" onclick="toggleReplyForm({{ $comment->id }})">
                            &#9993; Reply
                        </button>
                        <button class="comment-action-btn">
                            &#9829; Like ({{ $comment->likes_count ?? 0 }})
                        </button>
                        @auth
                            @if(auth()->id() === $comment->user_id)
                                <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment->id) }}" method="POST" style="display:inline;" onsubmit="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this comment?');">
                                    @csrf
                                    @method('DELETE')
                                    <button type="submit" class="comment-action-btn">
                                        &#128465; Delete
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            @endif
                        @endauth
                    </div>

                    {{-- Reply Form (hidden by default) --}}
                    <div id="reply-form-{{ $comment->id }}" style="display: none; margin-top: 15px; padding-left: 57px;">
                        @auth
                            <form action="{{ route('comments.store', $post->id) }}" method="POST">
                                @csrf
                                <input type="hidden" name="parent_id" value="{{ $comment->id }}">
                                <div class="form-group">
                                    <textarea name="content" rows="3" placeholder="Write your reply... (HTML formatting supported: <b>, <i>, <a>)" required></textarea>
                                </div>
                                <button type="submit" class="submit-btn" style="font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 8px 18px;">
                                    Post Reply
                                </button>
                            </form>
                        @else
                            <p style="color: #888; font-size: 0.9rem;">
                                Please <a href="{{ route('login') }}" style="color: #4361ee;">log in</a> to reply.
                            </p>
                        @endauth
                    </div>

                    {{-- Nested Replies --}}
                    @if($comment->replies && $comment->replies->count() > 0)
                        @foreach($comment->replies as $reply)
                            <div class="nested-comment" style="margin-top: 15px;">
                                <div class="comment-header">
                                    <div class="comment-avatar" style="width: 35px; height: 35px; font-size: 0.9rem;">
                                        {{ strtoupper(substr($reply->user->name, 0, 1)) }}
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="comment-author-info">
                                        <div class="comment-author" style="font-size: 0.9rem;">{{ $reply->user->name }}</div>
                                        <div class="comment-date">
                                            {{ $reply->created_at->diffForHumans() }}
                                            @if($reply->created_at != $reply->updated_at)
                                                <span>(edited)</span>
                                            @endif
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="comment-content" style="padding-left: 47px;">
                                    {!! $reply->content !!}
                                </div>
                                <div class="comment-actions" style="padding-left: 47px;">
                                    <button class="comment-action-btn">
                                        &#9829; Like ({{ $reply->likes_count ?? 0 }})
                                    </button>
                                    @auth
                                        @if(auth()->id() === $reply->user_id)
                                            <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $reply->id) }}" method="POST" style="display:inline;" onsubmit="return confirm('Delete this reply?');">
                                                @csrf
                                                @method('DELETE')
                                                <button type="submit" class="comment-action-btn">
                                                    &#128465; Delete
                                                </button>
                                            </form>
                                        @endif
                                    @endauth
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        @endforeach
                    @endif
                </div>
            @empty
                <div class="no-comments">
                    <p>No comments yet. Be the first to share your thoughts!</p>
                </div>
            @endforelse

            {{-- Pagination --}}
            @if($comments instanceof \Illuminate\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator)
                <div style="margin-top: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: center;">
                    {{ $comments->links() }}
                </div>
            @endif
        </div>

        {{-- New Comment Form --}}
        <div class="comment-form">
            <h3>Leave a Comment</h3>

            @auth
                <form action="{{ route('comments.store', $post->id) }}" method="POST">
                    @csrf
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label for="comment-content">Your Comment</label>
                        <textarea
                            id="comment-content"
                            name="content"
                            placeholder="Share your thoughts... You can use HTML for formatting."
                            required
                        >{{ old('content') }}</textarea>

                        @error('content')
                            <div style="color: #dc3545; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-top: 5px;">
                                {{ $message }}
                            </div>
                        @enderror

                        <div class="formatting-hint">
                            Formatting tips:
                            <code>&lt;b&gt;bold&lt;/b&gt;</code>,
                            <code>&lt;i&gt;italic&lt;/i&gt;</code>,
                            <code>&lt;a href="url"&gt;link&lt;/a&gt;</code>,
                            <code>&lt;u&gt;underline&lt;/u&gt;</code>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <button type="submit" class="submit-btn">Post Comment</button>
                </form>
            @else
                <p style="color: #666; text-align: center; padding: 20px 0;">
                    Please <a href="{{ route('login') }}" style="color: #4361ee; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600;">log in</a>
                    or <a href="{{ route('register') }}" style="color: #4361ee; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600;">register</a>
                    to leave a comment.
                </p>
            @endauth
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function toggleReplyForm(commentId) {
            const form = document.getElementById('reply-form-' + commentId);
            if (form.style.display === 'none') {
                // Hide all other open reply forms
                document.querySelectorAll('[id^="reply-form-"]').forEach(function(el) {
                    el.style.display = 'none';
                });
                form.style.display = 'block';
                form.querySelector('textarea').focus();
            } else {
                form.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>
